reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When i reaches k-1, c[i+1] accesses out-of-bounds memory, causing undefined behavior. 56.reason: [Loop runs up to k, but c[k] is uninitialized; should be i<k to avoid accessing out-of-bounds]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The loop runs to k+1, which is one iteration too many, accessing c[k] which is out-of-bounds. The correct bound should be i<k.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Off-by-one error: loop iterates to k+1, accessing uninitialized element c[k]. Should be i<k.]
